themes.theme: Broad USD weakness persists despite cautious risk mood
Central bank policy convergence week: BoJ, Fed, ECB, BoE all in focus
US-Iran nuclear stalemate supporting oil prices and weighing on risk-sensitive EM FX
JPY supported by BoJ policy expectations and safe-haven bid

key_observation: The dollar is failing to benefit from cautious risk sentiment, suggesting structural USD selling is overriding traditional safe-haven flows—likely reflecting eroding confidence in US policy credibility under a potential Warsh Fed.
watch: DXY reaction at the 100 level: a sustained failure to reclaim it ahead of the FOMC meeting could accelerate USD downside across the board
